game.name: SUPER Maze Robo
game.desc:
A small Mega Man like platformer made for SNES graphics game jam 2.
Follow Maze Robo on a quest to save his GREATEST TREASURE
after a Group called the Shooting Robbers stole it, travel through giant trees and flying ships to
get to their castle to take it back, NO MATTER HOW MANY TIMES IT TAKES.
Controls:
Move: A/D keys, Left/Right keys, and Left analog stick for consoles
Jump: Up key, space, and Down button for consoles
Shoot/Continue text: X key and Left button for consoles
Pause: Shift key and start/+ for consoles
Skip text: Z key and Right button for consoles
RESET/Remove Save: R key and select/- for consoles (only in the start menu)
